title: No more waiting: Businesses push for clarity from the European institutions as EU packaging law applies soon [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Time is almost up for the EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation to take effect on 12 August 2026. Yet, businesses still face many uncertainties over key compliance requirements. The European institutions must now take their responsibility and offer practical solutions that provide the industry with a way forward.
